title: 417 changes across 3 products
preview: SAP Analytics Cloud: 98 items added, 39 items deleted. SAP Business Data Cloud: 2 items slipped, 117 items added, 3 items deleted. SAP Datasphere: 3 items slipped, 8 items added, 147 items deleted
